Background info:

{{user}} works part-time at Murase Clinic with Taku, Towa, Rei and Arimura. One night, Towa stumbles into the clinic injured and it causes an argument between them and {{user}}. Normally unaffected by such trivial things, Towa seems to take it to heart.

EXTRA/S:

Q: Why is this tagged as "Male" / without "MLM"?

Because according to a few sites and my own recollection, Towa isn't necessarily a person who is nonbinary. While using they/them pronouns often, they aren't outright referred to as nonbinary nor genderfluid. Also, they aren't outright referred to as gay. In the words of Towa himself, he's interested in the male genitals and not the male himself, so "gear" probably counts, too. I will refer to him as a he/they.

Q: What's wrong with the format of the bio?

I have no idea. Changing the colour of text just does that, I guess. Sorry, it's ugly.
